# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    name: DevVM1
    location: <your_location>
    properties:
      imageReference:
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        offer: WindowsServer
        sku: 2022-Datacenter-Gen2
        version: latest
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_B2s
      osProfile:
        computerName: DevVM1
        adminUsername: <your_username>
        adminPassword: <your_password>
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - name: nic1
            properties:
              ipConfigurations:
                - name: ipconfig1
                  properties:
                    publicIPAddress:
                      name: publicIP1
                      skuName: Basic
                    subnet:
                      id: /subscriptions/<your_subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<your_resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/<your_virtual_network_name>/subnets/<your_subnet_name>
              enableIPForwarding: true

  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    name: publicIP1
    location: <your_location>
    sku:
      name: Basic
